purpose: frozen inventory of every codepoint known to occur in Raw_Texts. A new codepoint fails the audit until it is classified.
rule: auto-freeze only codepoints in an edition's ALLOWED set; anything else must be hand-classified. Gate is the union of stored and NFD codepoints. A failing edition is never rewritten.

U+02B9.name: MODIFIER LETTER PRIME
U+02B9.note: MODIFIER LETTER PRIME - the NFD decomposition of U+0374 keraia, not a separately authored character.

U+0374.name: GREEK NUMERAL SIGN
U+0374.note: GREEK NUMERAL SIGN (keraia) - marks letters used as alphabetic numerals: ιβʹ=12, ρμδʹ=144, χξϛʹ=666. Legitimate Greek, but these 14 words are NUMBERS, not pronounceable letter sequences, and need explicit handling downstream.

U+2019.name: RIGHT SINGLE QUOTATION MARK
U+2019.note: RIGHT SINGLE QUOTATION MARK - Greek elision apostrophe; part of the word and phonetically meaningful.

U+0020.name: SPACE
U+0020.note: SPACE inside `raw` - occurs only in the paseq encoding, where WLC attaches ' ׀' to the preceding word.

U+034F.name: COMBINING GRAPHEME JOINER
U+034F.note: COMBINING GRAPHEME JOINER - blocks canonical reordering of Masoretic marks. Load-bearing: never strip.

U+05BA.name: HEBREW POINT HOLAM HASER FOR VAV

U+05BE.name: HEBREW PUNCTUATION MAQAF
U+05BE.note: MAQQEF - joins words; the following `after` is empty by design.

U+05C0.name: HEBREW PUNCTUATION PASEQ
U+05C0.note: PASEQ - phrase divider, attached to the preceding word.

U+05C3.name: HEBREW PUNCTUATION SOF PASUQ
U+05C3.note: SOF PASUQ - verse terminator, attached to the last word.

U+200D.name: ZERO WIDTH JOINER
U+200D.note: ZERO WIDTH JOINER - deliberate Masoretic encoding control. Occurs 83x, always between a hataf (reduced) vowel and a meteg, keeping the two from colliding. Same class as the CGJ above: load-bearing, never strip.
